metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - New or elevated admin-role assignment detected
properties.description: Detects when an Entra ID directory role is assigned to an account ('Add member to role', 'Add eligible member to role', 'Add scoped member to role'). Assignments to high-privilege roles (Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, etc.) score highest. The rule boosts risk priority for target accounts on the VIPUsers or PrivilegedAccounts watchlists. ATT&CK: T1098.003 - Account Manipulation: Additional Cloud Roles (Privilege Escalation). TUNE: LookbackWindow (default 1d), HighPrivRoles list. Review TUNE comments in the query before deployment.
properties.query:
// ── Thresholds — TUNE: document changes in docs/tuning-notes.md ──────────
let LookbackWindow = 1d;  // TUNE: AuditLogs search window per scheduled run
// TUNE: roles whose assignment should be treated as highest-severity
let HighPrivRoles = dynamic([
    "Global Administrator",
    "Privileged Role Administrator",
    "Security Administrator",
    "Exchange Administrator",
    "SharePoint Administrator",
    "Hybrid Identity Administrator"
]);
// ── Watchlist lookups ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let VIPList = _GetWatchlist("VIPUsers")
    | project UPN = UserPrincipalName, ObjId = ObjectId, VIPReason;
let PrivList = _GetWatchlist("PrivilegedAccounts")
    | project UPN = UserPrincipalName, ObjId = ObjectId, AssignedRole, RoleSource;
// ── Base events: role-assignment audit entries ────────────────────────────
let BaseEvents = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackWindow)
    | where OperationName in (
          "Add member to role",
          "Add eligible member to role",
          "Add scoped member to role")
    | mv-expand TargetResources
    | extend TargetUPN     = tostring(TargetResources.userPrincipalName)
    | extend TargetObjId   = tostring(TargetResources.id)
    | extend RoleAssigned  = tostring(
          TargetResources.modifiedProperties[0].newValue)
    | extend ActorUPN      = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
    | extend ActorIPAddress = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
    | extend IsHighPrivRole = RoleAssigned in (HighPrivRoles)
    | where isnotempty(TargetUPN)
    | project TimeGenerated, TargetUPN, TargetObjId, RoleAssigned, IsHighPrivRole,
              ActorUPN, ActorIPAddress, OperationName, CorrelationId,
              Result, ResultDescription;
// ── Apply watchlist joins on TARGET account and RiskScore boost ───────────
BaseEvents
| join kind=leftouter (VIPList)  on $left.TargetUPN == $right.UPN
| join kind=leftouter (PrivList) on $left.TargetUPN == $right.UPN
| extend IsVIP  = isnotempty(VIPReason),
         IsPriv = isnotempty(AssignedRole)
// TUNABLE: +10 VIP-only, +10 Priv-only, +25 both (iff — not cumulative addition)
| extend RiskBoost = case(IsVIP and IsPriv, 25, IsVIP or IsPriv, 10, 0)
| extend RiskScore = RiskBoost + iff(IsHighPrivRole, 15, 0)
| extend RiskLabel = case(
    IsVIP and IsPriv, strcat(TargetUPN, " [VIP+PRIV — HIGHEST PRIORITY]"),
    IsVIP,            strcat(TargetUPN, " [VIP]"),
    IsPriv,           strcat(TargetUPN, " [PRIV]"),
    TargetUPN)
| sort by RiskScore desc, IsHighPrivRole desc, TimeGenerated desc
| project TimeGenerated, RiskLabel, RiskScore,
          IsVIP, IsPriv, VIPReason, AssignedRole, RoleSource,
          RoleAssigned, IsHighPrivRole,
          ActorUPN, ActorIPAddress,
          OperationName, CorrelationId, Result
